questions: You mention that the bare→boosted score spread was 'massive and consistent' — what made you decide that this pattern was important enough to design the golden set around, rather than just aiming for strong scores on fully-specified inputs?

The Router v2 only improved downstream scores by a few points even though it fixed the misclassification — why did you decide to promote it anyway instead of waiting to see if other changes would move the needle more?

You built the Improvement Suggester to feed Claude's analysis back into the loop, but the entry cuts off before showing what it actually suggested — what did Claude recommend, and has any of it changed how you're thinking about the next week?
